name: David Cross
bio: David Cross is an American stand-up comedian, actor, and writer best known as co-creator and co-star of the cult HBO sketch series Mr. Show with Bob and David and as Tobias Funke on Arrested Development. His stand-up is acerbic and politically charged, frequently targeting religion, politics, and consumer culture. He is an Emmy winner and Grammy nominee.

timeline.ev: Mr. Show with Bob and David premieres on HBO
Releases album Shut Up You Baby
Begins playing Tobias Funke on Arrested Development
Comedy special Bigger and Blackerer released
Special Making America Great Again released

accolades: Co-creator of Mr. Show with Bob and David
